title: Island Biomes
description: Let players change their island biome. Turn a plains island into a jungle, desert, mushroom fields, or any biome you configure.
body:
# 🌿 Island Biomes — Transform Your Island

Let players change their island's biome with a single command. Plains become jungle, desert turns to mushroom fields — the island transforms visually with new grass colors, weather, and mob spawns.

## Features

- **Any biome available** — configure which biomes players can choose
- **Visual transformation** — grass color, water color, sky, weather, and particles all change
- **Mob spawning changes** — different biomes spawn different mobs
- **Cost system** — charge in-game currency, island level, or challenge completion for biome changes
- **GUI selector** — players browse and preview biomes through an in-game menu
- **Works with all BentoBox game modes**

📦 Requires [BentoBox](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bentobox) + a game mode addon.
